trait.name: Tool Proficiencies
trait.text: You gain proficiency with two types of artisan's tools of your choice.

trait.name: Languages
trait.text: You can speak, read, and write Common and one extra language of your choice.

trait.name: Equipment
trait.text: You start with a set of artisan's tools (one of your choice), a merchant's scale, a set of common clothes, and a belt pouch containing 15 gp.

trait.name: Feature: Guild Membership
trait.text: As an established and respected member of a guild, you can rely on certain benefits that membership provides.
